step_rationale: Angiogenesis regulation; endothelial function & vascular stability.
mechanism: miR-92a-3p, packaged in extracellular microvesicles, regulates angiogenesis and endothelial vascular stability in acute coronary syndromes.

references.title: Atherosclerotic Conditions Promote the Packaging of Functional MicroRNA-92a-3p Into Endothelial Microvesicles.
